title: Level 11: Basic Forms
description: User se data lene ka pehla kadam.
guide:
Forms Kya Hain?

Jab bhi aap login karte hain ya Google search karte hain, aap Form use kar rahe hote hain.

  • <input>: Jahan user likhta hai.
  • placeholder: Input ke andar ka halka text.
  • type='text': Normal writing ke liye.
